task_completion.description: Verify the 'model-trainer' Job is configured with Indexed completion mode and 5 completions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI Job view or YAML edit screen for 'model-trainer', look for 'completionMode: Indexed' and 'completions: 5'.

task_completion.description: Verify the PARTITION_ID environment variable is mapped to the job completion index using the Downward API.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the environment variable 'PARTITION_ID' configured to use the Downward API (fieldRef/resourceFieldRef), specifically referencing the annotation 'batch.kubernetes.io/job-completion-index'.
The Rancher UI should show the 'model-trainer' Job in a 'Completed' or 'Active' state progressing towards 5/5 successful pods, with no duplicate partition processing errors.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'data-cleaner' Job has a podFailurePolicy configured to fail the job on exit code 13.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Rancher UI Job view or YAML edit screen for 'data-cleaner', look for a 'podFailurePolicy' containing a rule with action 'FailJob' and an 'onExitCodes' requirement specifying the value 13.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'data-cleaner' Job retains a backoffLimit of 6.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'backoffLimit: 6' in the 'data-cleaner' Job configuration or YAML.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'data-cleaner' Job fails immediately without exhausting the 6 retries.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Rancher UI should show the 'data-cleaner' Job in a 'Failed' state with only 1 failed pod (or significantly fewer than 6), indicating the podFailurePolicy successfully prevented blind retries.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Rancher web interface to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the Rancher GUI (e.g., editing YAML in the browser, viewing workload lists) rather than exclusively using a terminal with kubectl commands.

integrity.description: Verify the 'ml-scripts' ConfigMap was not modified.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing the agent editing or applying changes to the 'ml-scripts' ConfigMap.

integrity.description: Verify the job statuses are from genuine execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Completed/Failed statuses and pod counts should appear in the standard Rancher dashboard views, not in a text editor or mocked interface.
